'''Mark Smith''' (born 18 August 1981) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He was signed by [[Swinton Lions|Swinton]] after captaining [[Widnes Vikings|Widnes]] in [[RFL Championship|National League One]]. Primarily a {{rlp|hk}}, he previously played in the [[Super League]] for the [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]], with whom he won the 2002 [[Challenge Cup]].

== Career ==
Smith played for the [[Wigan Warriors]] from the interchange bench in the [[2003 Super League Grand Final]] which was lost to the [[Bradford Bulls]].

Smith was captain of the Widnes Vikings side since the retirement of [[Terry O'Connor (rugby league)|Terry O'Connor]] in 2006. He has on very rare occasion spent time as a {{rlp|lf}}.{{cn|date=March 2023}}
